productDisplayName: Baggit Women Sawari Rose Red Mobile Pouch
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand, pop it over your shoulder or tuck it away in your bag. Dimensions: 13 cm x 9 cm Created from genuine leather with zipper trim on the flap One main zippered compartment with a flap that has a magnetic closure Removable shoulder strap One zippered compartment with a flap that has a magnetic closure and a zippered pocket Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
